files.patch:
@@ -1,137 +0,0 @@
-# ========
-# General
-# ========
-
-set -g prefix M-Space
-
-set -g allow-rename off
-set -g base-index 1
-set -g buffer-limit 10
-set -g visual-activity on
-set -g visual-bell on
-
-setw -g mode-keys vi
-
-# Renumber windows after closing any window.
-set -g renumber-windows on
-
-# Use a more helpful scroll history size.
-set -g history-limit 10000
-
-# Use the xterm-256color terminal
-set -g default-terminal "xterm-256color"
-
-# Apply Tc
-set -ga terminal-overrides ",xterm-256color:Tc"
-
-# SSH compatibility: remove SSH_AUTH_SOCK to disable tmux automatically
-# resetting the variable.
-set -g update-environment -r
-setenv -g SSH_AUTH_SOCK $HOME/.ssh/ssh_auth_sock
-
-# Status line; look for tmuxline in ~/.vimrc.
-setenv -g TMUX_PROFILE $ITERM_PROFILE
-is_light='[ "$TMUX_PROFILE" = "light" ]'
-tmuxline_dark="~/.tmux/tmuxline-dark.conf"
-tmuxline_light="~/.tmux/tmuxline-light.conf"
-if-shell "$is_light" "source $tmuxline_light" "source $tmuxline_dark"
-
-# =============
-# Key bindings
-# =============
-
-# Configuration
-bind n command-prompt 'rename-window %%'
-bind N command-prompt 'rename-session %%'
-
-# Window management
-bind . last-window
-bind -r ] next-window
-bind -r [ previous-window
-bind -r < swap-window -t :-
-bind -r > swap-window -t :+
-bind -n F1 select-window -t 1
-bind -n F2 select-window -t 2
-bind -n F3 select-window -t 3
-bind -n F4 select-window -t 4
-bind -n F5 select-window -t 5
-bind -n F6 select-window -t 6
-bind -n F7 select-window -t 7
-bind -n F8 select-window -t 8
-bind -n F9 select-window -t 9
-bind -n F10 select-window -t 10
-
-# Pane management
-bind \\ split-window -h -c "#{pane_current_path}"
-bind - split-window -v -c "#{pane_current_path}"
-bind -r '{' swap-pane -U
-bind -r '}' swap-pane -D
-bind -r ( rotate-window -U
-bind -r ) rotate-window -D
-bind -r Left resize-pane -L 1
-bind -r Down resize-pane -D 1
-bind -r Up resize-pane -U 1
-bind -r Right resize-pane -R 1
-bind -r S-Left resize-pane -L 2
-bind -r S-Down resize-pane -D 2
-bind -r S-Up resize-pane -U 2
-bind -r S-Right resize-pane -R 2
-bind -r M-Left resize-pane -L 5
-bind -r M-Down resize-pane -D 5
-bind -r M-Up resize-pane -U 5
-bind -r M-Right resize-pane -R 5
-
-# Smart pane switching with awareness of Vim splits.
-# See: https://github.com/christoomey/vim-tmux-navigator
-is_vim="ps -o state= -o comm= -t '#{pane_tty}' \
-          | grep -iqE '^[^TXZ ]+ +(\\S+\\/)?g?(view|n?vim?x?)(diff)?$'"
-bind -n C-h if-shell "$is_vim" "send-keys C-h"  "select-pane -L"
-bind -n C-j if-shell "$is_vim" "send-keys C-j"  "select-pane -D"
-bind -n C-k if-shell "$is_vim" "send-keys C-k"  "select-pane -U"
-bind -n C-l if-shell "$is_vim" "send-keys C-l"  "select-pane -R"
-bind -n C-\\ if-shell "$is_vim" "send-keys C-\\\\" "select-pane -l"
-bind-key -T copy-mode-vi C-h select-pane -L
-bind-key -T copy-mode-vi C-j select-pane -D
-bind-key -T copy-mode-vi C-k select-pane -U
-bind-key -T copy-mode-vi C-l select-pane -R
-bind-key -T copy-mode-vi C-\\ select-pane -l
-
-# Work around CTRL+L for clearing the screen.
-bind C-l send-keys 'C-l'
-
-# Copy & paste
-bind Space copy-mode
-bind o delete-buffer
-bind p paste-buffer -d
-bind P paste-buffer
-bind b list-buffers
-bind B choose-buffer
-
-# Toggle tmuxline color based on terminal color profile.
-bind = if-shell "$is_light"  \
-                "source $tmuxline_dark; setenv -g TMUX_PROFILE dark"  \
-                "source $tmuxline_light; setenv -g TMUX_PROFILE light"
-# =======
-# Plugins
-# =======
-
-set -g @resurrect-strategy-vim 'session'
-set -g @resurrect-capture-pane-contents 'on'
-
-set -g @sidebar-tree-command 'tree -C'
-set -g @sidebar-tree-width '60'
-
-# FIXME: tmux-copycat and tmux-yank have trouble with tmux 2.5. Uncomment once
-# the issues resolve.
-set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tpm'
-set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-copycat'
-set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-open'
-set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-resurrect'
-set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-sensible'
-set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-sidebar'
-
-# Install TPM if not already installed.
-if "test ! -d ~/.tmux/plugins/tpm" \
-   "run 'git clone https://github.com/tmux-plugins/tpm ~/.tmux/plugins/tpm'"
-
-run '~/.tmux/plugins/tpm/tpm'

@@ -1,26 +0,0 @@
-# This tmux statusbar config was originally created by tmuxline.vim
-# on Sat, 11 Nov 2017. It is now hand-maintained after the tmux 2.9 syntax
-# changes.
-
-set -g mode-style fg=colour240,bg=colour230
-
-set -g status "on"
-set -g status-justify "left"
-set -g status-style fg=colour240,bg=colour235,none
-set -g status-left-style none
-set -g status-right-style none
-set -g status-left-length "100"
-set -g status-right-length "100"
-set -g pane-border-style fg=colour240
-set -g pane-active-border-style fg=colour33
-set -g message-style fg=colour234,bg=colour240
-set -g message-command-style fg=colour234,bg=colour240
-
-setw -g window-status-style fg=colour245,bg=colour235,none
-setw -g window-status-activity-style fg=colour33,bg=colour235,none
-setw -g window-status-separator ""
-
-set -g status-left "#[fg=colour234,bg=colour33] #S #[fg=colour33,bg=colour235,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]"
-set -g status-right "#[fg=colour235,bg=colour235,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]#[fg=colour245,bg=colour235]  %Y-%m-%d  %H:%M#(tmux-mem-cpu-load -q -g 5 -m 2 -i 2) #[fg=colour245,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]#[fg=colour234,bg=colour245]  #h "
-setw -g window-status-format "#[fg=colour235,bg=colour235,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]#[default] #I  #W #[fg=colour235,bg=colour235,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]"
-setw -g window-status-current-format "#[fg=colour235,bg=colour240,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]#[fg=colour234,bg=colour240] #I  #W #[fg=colour240,bg=colour235,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]"

@@ -1,25 +0,0 @@
-# This tmux statusbar config was created by tmuxline.vim
-# on Sat, 11 Nov 2017
-
-set -g mode-style fg=colour240,bg=colour187
-
-set -g status "on"
-set -g status-justify "left"
-set -g status-style fg=colour240,bg=colour187,none
-set -g status-left-style none
-set -g status-right-style none
-set -g status-left-length "100"
-set -g status-right-length "100"
-set -g pane-border-style fg=colour244
-set -g pane-active-border-style fg=colour33
-set -g message-style fg=colour230,bg=colour244
-set -g message-command-style fg=colour230,bg=colour244
-
-setw -g window-status-style fg=colour239,bg=colour187,none
-setw -g window-status-activity-style fg=colour33,bg=colour187,none
-setw -g window-status-separator ""
-
-set -g status-left "#[fg=colour230,bg=colour33] #S #[fg=colour33,bg=colour187,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]"
-set -g status-right "#[fg=colour187,bg=colour187,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]#[fg=colour239,bg=colour187]  %Y-%m-%d  %H:%M#(tmux-mem-cpu-load -q -g 5 -m 2 -i 2) #[fg=colour239,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]#[fg=colour230,bg=colour239]  #h "
-setw -g window-status-format "#[fg=colour187,bg=colour187,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]#[default] #I  #W #[fg=colour187,bg=colour187,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]"
-setw -g window-status-current-format "#[fg=colour187,bg=colour244,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]#[fg=colour230,bg=colour244] #I  #W #[fg=colour244,bg=colour187,nobold,nounderscore,noitalics]"
